title: epipactis guegelii
intro: Epipactis guegelii, also known as the autumn lady's tresses, is a species of orchid native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its unique, nodding flower spikes. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Epipactis guegelii are thought to include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and possibly aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, but more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
